title: carex breviculmis
intro: Carex breviculmis, also known as the short-stem sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex breviculmis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
